parameter.name: NorthwindContext-Web.config Connection String
parameter.description: NorthwindContext Connection String used in web.config by the application to access the database.
parameter.defaultValue: Data Source=.; Initial Catalog=Northwind; Integrated Security=True; MultipleActiveResultSets=True

parameter.name: Repository.Pattern.Ef6.DataContext-Web.config Connection String
parameter.description: Repository.Pattern.Ef6.DataContext Connection String used in web.config by the application to access the database.
